display_text: Mango Tree, Tier N/A: Consumable that plants a permanent mango tree at target location. The tree provides unlimited mango power, generating one Enchanted Mango (item) every 60 seconds. It also grants unobstructed vision in the area around it. Stats: Mango Spawn Interval: 60s, Vision Radius: Unobstructed.
